Messages:
  - This web application, **StressCare**, is a comprehensive health platform focused on real-time stress detection, monitoring, and AI-driven insights. It consists of two primary modules: a mobile-first user application and an administrative web dashboard.

### 1. Project Structure
The project is organized into functional directories for styles, screens, and logic:
- `/html`: Contains 25 mobile-optimized user screens (e.g., `home.html`, `monitoring.html`, `profile.html`).
- `/webapp`: Contains the admin dashboard and management screens (e.g., `admin-dashboard.html`, `model-management.html`).
- `/css`: Screen-specific stylesheets (e.g., `dashboard.css`, `auth.css`).
- `/js`: Global utilities and API helpers (`main.js`).
- `/images`: Branding and onboarding assets.

### 2. Sidebar & Navigation
- **User App**: Uses a **bottom navigation bar** for primary features (`html/home.html` lines 259-265):
  - Home, Monitoring, History, Interventions, Profile.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Features a **collapsible sidebar** with grouped navigation (`webapp/model-management.html` lines 338-416):
  - **Main**: Dashboard, User Management.
  - **Management**: Subscriptions (Plans, Records), Finance (Payments, Revenue).
  - **System**: AI & Cloud (Model Management, Cloud Sync).
  - **Support**: Feedback, Notifications.

### 3. Routing
The application uses **file-based routing** (relative HTML links) rather than a client-side router.
- **User Flow**: `splash.html` → `onboarding.html` → `register.html` → `login.html` → `home.html`.
- **Admin Flow**: `admin-login.html` → `admin-dashboard.html`.
- **Navigation Logic**: Handled via `window.location.href` or `window.location.replace` in `js/main.js` and inline scripts.

### 4. Model Management
The Model Management system (`webapp/model-management.html`) allows administrators to:
- **Monitor Performance**: View metrics like accuracy (e.g., 94.2% for Stress Detection v2.4).
- **Version Control**: Manage multiple model versions (Active, Archived, Draft).
- **Deployment**: Buttons to "Upload New Model" and "Deploy" specific versions.
- **Metadata Tracking**: Track training datasets, epochs, and release dates.

### 5. Logout Functionality
- **User App**: Located in `html/profile.html`. The `handleLogout()` function prompts a confirmation dialog and redirects to `login.html`.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Found in the sidebar of all `webapp/` files. The `logout()` function removes the authentication token (`sessionStorage.removeItem('sc_admin_auth')`) and redirects to `admin-login.html`.

<script>
    function logout() {
      sessionStorage.removeItem('sc_admin_auth');
      window.location.replace('admin-login.html');
    }
    function toggleGroup(header) {
      header.classList.toggle('open');
      const sub = header.nextElementSibling;
      sub.classList.toggle('open');
    }
    function toggleNotif(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const drop = document.getElementById('notifDrop');
      drop.classList.toggle('open');
    }
    function markAllRead() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.notif-item.unread').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('unread'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.notif-dot').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
      const badge = document.getElementById('notifBadge');
      if (badge) badge.style.display = 'none';
    }
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const drop = document.getElementById('notifDrop');
      if (drop && !drop.closest('.notif-wrap').contains(e.target)) drop.classList.remove('open');
      const payDrop = document.getElementById('payDrop');
      if (payDrop && !e.target.closest('[onclick*="togglePayDP"]') && !payDrop.contains(e.target)) payDrop.style.display = 'none';
    });

    /* ── Payment Search ── */
    function filterPayments() {
      const q = (document.getElementById('paySearch').value || '').toLowerCase().trim();
      document.querySelectorAll('#payTable tbody tr').forEach(row => {
        const text = row.textContent.toLowerCase();
        row.style.display = (!q || text.includes(q)) ? '' : 'none';
      });
      updatePayCount();
    }

    function updatePayCount() {
      const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#payTable tbody tr');
      const visible = Array.from(rows).filter(r => r.style.display !== 'none').length;
      const info = document.querySelector('.pagination .showing');
      if (info) info.textContent = `Showing 1 to ${visible} of ${visible} results`;
    }

    /* ── Payment Date Picker ── */
    function togglePayDP(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const d = document.getElementById('payDrop');
      d.style.display = d.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
    function applyPayDP() {
      const from = document.getElementById('payFrom').value;
      const to = document.getElementById('payTo').value;
      if (!from || !to) { alert('Please select both dates'); return; }
      const fmt = s => new Date(s+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {day:'numeric', month:'short', year:'numeric'});
      document.getElementById('payDateLabel').textContent = '📅 ' + fmt(from) + ' – ' + fmt(to);
      document.getElementById('payDrop').style.display = 'none';
    }
    function payPreset(days) {
      const to = new Date(); to.setHours(0,0,0,0);
      const from = new Date(to); from.setDate(from.getDate() - days + 1);
      document.getElementById('payFrom').value = from.toISOString().slice(0,10);
      document.getElementById('payTo').value = to.toISOString().slice(0,10);
      applyPayDP();
    }

    /* ── Export CSV ── */
    function exportPaymentCSV() {
      const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#payTable tbody tr');
      const headers = ['Transaction ID','User','Email','Plan','Amount','Method','Date','Status'];
      const lines = [headers.join(',')];
      rows.forEach(row => {
        const cells = row.querySelectorAll('td');
        if (cells.length < 7) return;
        const txn = (cells[0].textContent || '').trim();
        const user = (cells[1].querySelector('.user-name') || cells[1]).textContent.trim();
        const email = (cells[1].querySelector('.user-email') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        const plan = (cells[2].textContent || '').trim();
        const amount = (cells[3].textContent || '').trim();
        const method = (cells[4].textContent || '').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ');
        const date = (cells[5].textContent || '').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ');
        const status = (cells[6].textContent || '').trim();
        lines.push([txn,user,email,plan,amount,method,date,status].map(v => `"${v.replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(','));
      });
      const blob = new Blob([lines.join('\n')], {type:'text/csv'});
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = 'payment_report_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.csv';
      a.click();
    }

</script>

<script>
    function logout() {
      sessionStorage.removeItem('sc_admin_auth');
      window.location.replace('admin-login.html');
    }
    function toggleGroup(header) {
      header.classList.toggle('open');
      const sub = header.nextElementSibling;
      sub.classList.toggle('open');
    }
    function toggleNotif(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const drop = document.getElementById('notifDrop');
      drop.classList.toggle('open');
    }
    function markAllRead() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.notif-item.unread').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('unread'));
      document.querySelectorAll('.notif-dot').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
      const badge = document.getElementById('notifBadge');
      if (badge) badge.style.display = 'none';
    }
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const drop = document.getElementById('notifDrop');
      if (drop && !drop.closest('.notif-wrap').contains(e.target)) drop.classList.remove('open');
      const fbDrop = document.getElementById('fbDateDrop');
      if (fbDrop && !e.target.closest('[onclick*="toggleFbDate"]') && !fbDrop.contains(e.target)) fbDrop.style.display = 'none';
    });

    /* ── Feedback Date Picker ── */
    function toggleFbDateDrop(e) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const d = document.getElementById('fbDateDrop');
      d.style.display = d.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
    function applyFbDate() {
      const from = document.getElementById('fbFrom').value;
      const to = document.getElementById('fbTo').value;
      if (!from || !to) { alert('Please select both dates'); return; }
      const fmt = s => new Date(s+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {day:'numeric', month:'short', year:'numeric'});
      document.querySelector('.date-range-input').textContent = '📅 ' + fmt(from) + ' – ' + fmt(to) + ' ▾';
      document.getElementById('fbDateDrop').style.display = 'none';
      applyFbFilters();
    }

    /* ── Feedback Filters ── */
    function applyFbFilters() {
      const stress = (document.getElementById('fbStressFilter').value || '').toLowerCase();
      const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.table-section table tbody tr');
      let visible = 0;
      rows.forEach(row => {
        const stressCells = row.querySelectorAll('.stress-pill');
        const reportedStress = stressCells.length > 1 ? stressCells[1].textContent.toLowerCase() : '';
        const stressOk = !stress || reportedStress.includes(stress);
        row.style.display = stressOk ? '' : 'none';
        if (stressOk) visible++;
      });
      const info = document.querySelector('.pagination .showing');
      if (info) info.textContent = `Showing 1 to ${visible} of 12,842 records`;
    }

    function clearFbFilters() {
      document.getElementById('fbStressFilter').value = '';
      document.getElementById('fbPlanFilter').value = '';
      document.querySelectorAll('.table-section table tbody tr').forEach(r => r.style.display = '');
      const info = document.querySelector('.pagination .showing');
      if (info) info.textContent = 'Showing 1 to 8 of 12,842 records';
    }

    /* ── Export CSV ── */
    function exportFeedbackCSV() {
      const headers = ['User','Email','Predicted Stress','Reported Stress','PSS Score','Date','Match Status'];
      const lines = [headers.join(',')];
      document.querySelectorAll('.table-section table tbody tr').forEach(row => {
        if (row.style.display === 'none') return;
        const name = (row.querySelector('.user-name') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        const email = (row.querySelector('.user-email') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        const pills = row.querySelectorAll('.stress-pill');
        const predicted = pills[0] ? pills[0].textContent.trim() : '';
        const reported = pills[1] ? pills[1].textContent.trim() : '';
        const pss = (row.querySelector('.pss-score') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        const date = (row.querySelector('.date-cell') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        const match = (row.querySelector('.match-pill') || {textContent:''}).textContent.trim();
        lines.push([name,email,predicted,reported,pss,date,match].map(v => `"${v.replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(','));
      });
      const blob = new Blob([lines.join('\n')], {type:'text/csv'});
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = 'feedback_data_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) + '.csv';
      a.click();
    }

    /* Logout style */
    const fblStyle = document.createElement('style');
    fblStyle.textContent = `.logout-btn { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;padding:0.6rem 0.9rem;color:#FF3B30;font-size:0.83rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,59,48,0.22);background:rgba(255,59,48,0.06);font-family:inherit;width:100%;border-radius:10px;transition:all 0.15s; } .logout-btn:hover { background:rgba(255,59,48,0.13);border-color:rgba(255,59,48,0.38); }`;
    document.head.appendChild(fblStyle);

</script>
